title: Runtime artifact retention and GC policy
goal: Define and implement or explicitly defer retention, TTL and garbage-collection behavior for runtime artifacts such as query_trace, context_bundle and agent_query_session.

acceptance.assertion: Retention states and TTL/GC policy are machine-readable or explicitly deferred with rationale.
Any deletion/GC behavior is opt-in, documented and test-covered; existing artifacts are not silently removed.
Backward compatibility for existing runtime artifacts is tested or a migration gap is recorded.

metadata.outcome: Implemented in Lenskit PR #921: runtime artifact retention for query_trace, context_bundle and agent_query_session is now explicit and machine-readable. The policy deliberately keeps retention unbounded_currently, disables TTL and GC, and adds no deletion path. Diagnostics expose policy identity without mutating stored artifacts.
validation: Lenskit PR #921 GitHub CI passed after final head: pytest-full, ruff, CodeQL, doc-freshness, planning-registration, validate-merge-meta, contract checks, reusable fixture validation, graph checks and webui-js-tests.
Codex P2 feedback was addressed before merge: diagnostics exact field-set contract now includes retention_policy_id and retention_policy_status.
Local before merge: 166 runtime artifact retention/diagnostics/lookup/API/session tests passed.
Local before merge: targeted ruff-ci check passed.
Local before merge: planning-registration ratchet reported no new drift.
Local before merge: doc-freshness inspect PASS.
Local before merge: git diff --check origin/main...HEAD passed.
Post-merge on origin/main 79cbc5a99939647fa81735e1b71d98109f48650a: same 166 tests passed, targeted ruff passed, planning-registration no new drift, doc-freshness PASS and diff-check pass.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t008-policy: runtime_artifact_retention_policy() provides a machine-readable policy for query_trace, context_bundle and agent_query_session with status explicitly_deferred and default retention unbounded_currently.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t008-no-surprise-delete: Policy and tests assert ttl_enabled=false, gc_enabled=false, automatic_delete=false, no deletion mode and no store/lookup surprise deletion.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t008-compat: Legacy runtime artifacts are backfilled on read and diagnostics do not rewrite the store file.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t008-local-task: Lenskit local task TASK-RUNTIME-ARTIFACT-RETENTION-001 was marked done with updated evidence and remaining non-claims.
